name: Firmware version supports current validation plan
triage: Update firmware before running full regression.

name: PCIe link trains to x4
triage: Check board lane configuration and retimer logs.

name: NVMe controller ready bit is set
Read latency p99 below target
triage: Inspect queue depth, garbage collection, and firmware throttling.

name: Write latency p99 below target
triage: Review NAND program latency and write cache behavior.

name: Peak thermal stays inside validation envelope
triage: Check fan curve and workload duty cycle.

name: Error log page is available
triage: Enable diagnostic feature flag and rerun firmware smoke test.
